concept.concept_text: Assume a temporary pre-recombination screening field that lowers the sound horizon while leaving late-time ladder calibration explicit.

decision.rationale: Stub checks produced a constrained failure record and a branchable assumption change.

hypothesis.title: Zoroto screening field reduces early sound horizon
falsification_tests: Reject if Planck-like CMB summary worsens beyond L2 threshold.
Reject if BAO and local H0 prefer mutually incompatible H0 values.
Reject if S8 shift exceeds screening guardrail.
